name: godplans
description: Produce an audit-aware, validated, agent-executable master plan (PLAN.mdx) before application code is written. One command runs discovery, forces hard-to-reverse decisions, plans 18 applicable domains, emits verified checkbox tasks, and enforces explicit approval before execution. Descends from aihxp arc-ready, ready-suite, the seven hannsxpeter auditors (code, sec, db, llm, seo, ui, ux), pillars, codedna, and BuilderIO visual-plan. Refuses plan theater, vague tasks without verification, and policy-violating projects.
